# logging

```go
import "github.com/Ask-Atlas/AskAtlas/api/internal/logging"
```

Package logging provides a configurable structured logger using slog.

```go
func NewLogger(opts ...Option) *slog.Logger
```

NewLogger instantiates a new configured slog instance.

<a name="RequestLogger"></a>
## func [RequestLogger](<https://github.com/Ask-Atlas/AskAtlas/blob/main/api/internal/logging/logging.go#L105>)

```go
func RequestLogger(log *slog.Logger) func(http.Handler) http.Handler
```

RequestLogger returns an HTTP middleware that logs the method, path, status, and duration of requests.

<a name="Option"></a>
## type [Option](<https://github.com/Ask-Atlas/AskAtlas/blob/main/api/internal/logging/logging.go#L25>)

Option defines a functional configuration option for the logger.

```go
type Option func(*loggerConfig)
```

<a name="WithAddSource"></a>
### func [WithAddSource](<https://github.com/Ask-Atlas/AskAtlas/blob/main/api/internal/logging/logging.go#L42>)

```go
func WithAddSource(addSource bool) Option
```

WithAddSource controls whether logged items include the calling source file and line.

```go
func WithEnv(env string) Option
```

WithEnv sets the environment string.

<a name="WithHandler"></a>
### func [WithHandler](<https://github.com/Ask-Atlas/AskAtlas/blob/main/api/internal/logging/logging.go#L56>)

```go
func WithHandler(handler slog.Handler) Option
```

WithHandler explicitly sets the underlying slog.Handler, bypassing the defaults.

<a name="WithLevel"></a>
### func [WithLevel](<https://github.com/Ask-Atlas/AskAtlas/blob/main/api/internal/logging/logging.go#L35>)

```go
func WithLevel(level slog.Level) Option
```

WithLevel sets the minimum logging severity level.

### func [WithWriter](<https://github.com/Ask-Atlas/AskAtlas/blob/main/api/internal/logging/logging.go#L49>)

```go
func WithWriter(writer io.Writer) Option
```

WithWriter changes the output destination from the default os.Stdout.
